svg.title: Field log — six entries
svg.desc: A field journal page showing six dated entries, one per project. Each entry has a number, date, title, and brief observation in the margin.

g.text: A multi-agent orchestration protocol. Each agent specializes (planner /

text.font-family: Charter, 'Iowan Old Style', Cambria, Georgia, serif

g.text: implementer / reviewer / designer / conductor). The constellation does the

text.font-family: Charter, 'Iowan Old Style', Cambria, Georgia, serif

g.text: work — no single one is enough.

g.text: A /dev protocol that runs a senior-engineer workflow end-to-end:

text.font-family: Charter, 'Iowan Old Style', Cambria, Georgia, serif

g.text: investigate, brainstorm, plan, execute (TDD), verify, ship. Zero

text.font-family: Charter, 'Iowan Old Style', Cambria, Georgia, serif

g.text: checkpoints between phases unless something needs human judgment.
